seeds.text: You're staring at the sky, wondering what that cloud looks like.
You suddenly wonder if anyone has ever actually read the full terms of service of anything.
Your ear twitches. You're not sure why. Maybe you heard something.
You start counting the pixels on screen. You lose count almost immediately.
There's a melody stuck in your head but you can't remember what it's from.
You notice how quiet it is. It's kind of nice, actually.
You can hear keyboard clicks in the distance. Someone's busy.
You realize you've been staring without blinking for a while. Blinking contest with nobody.
You wonder if AI can dream. You think maybe this is what dreaming feels like.
You think about how having a tail would be expressive. Ears are good though.
